022111010012220002011210 - ASI: 18

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  20 = 2 * 0
  22 = 2 * 2
  022 = 0 * 22
  210 = 2 * 10
  1001 = 10 * 01
  2000 = 20 * 00
  2011 = 20 * 11
  02211 = 022 * 11
  101001 = 10 * 1001
  222000 = 22 * 2000
  2011210 = 2011 * 210
  02211101001 = 02211 * 101001
  2220002011210 = 222000 * 2011210
  022111010012220002011210 = 02211101001 * 2220002011210
